title: gladiolus violaceus
intro: Gladiolus violaceus, also known as the violet glad or sword lily, is a perennial plant species belonging to the iris family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus violaceus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a useful remedy for various respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus violaceus typically involve boiling the roots or flowers in water to create a medicinal tea, which is then consumed to harness its therapeutic benefits.
